datasets.name: ce685a08
queryLines:
SELECT initiated_by, COUNT(*) as ct
FROM system.access.assistant_events
WHERE event_date >= date_trunc('month', current_date - interval 1 month)
  AND event_date < date_trunc('month', current_date)
GROUP BY initiated_by
SORT BY ct DESC

datasets.name: ad4f011f
queryLines:
WITH RankedInitiators AS (
  SELECT
    workspace_id,
    initiated_by,
    COUNT(*) AS event_count,
    DENSE_RANK() OVER (PARTITION BY workspace_id ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC) AS rank
  FROM system.access.assistant_events
  GROUP BY workspace_id, initiated_by
)
SELECT workspace_id, initiated_by, event_count
FROM RankedInitiators
WHERE rank = 1

datasets.name: platform_breakdown
queryLines:
SELECT
  CASE
    WHEN user_agent LIKE '%HeadlessChrome%' THEN 'Automated/API'
    WHEN user_agent LIKE '%Chrome%' THEN 'Chrome'
    WHEN user_agent LIKE '%Firefox%' THEN 'Firefox'
    WHEN
      user_agent LIKE '%Safari%'
      AND user_agent NOT LIKE '%Chrome%'
    THEN
      'Safari'
    ELSE 'Other'
  END as platform,
  event_date,
  initiated_by,
  event_id
FROM
  system.access.assistant_events

datasets.name: hourly_patterns
queryLines:
SELECT
  HOUR(event_time) as hour_of_day,
  DAYOFWEEK(event_date) as day_of_week,
  CASE DAYOFWEEK(event_date)
    WHEN 1 THEN 'Sun'
    WHEN 2 THEN 'Mon'
    WHEN 3 THEN 'Tue'
    WHEN 4 THEN 'Wed'
    WHEN 5 THEN 'Thu'
    WHEN 6 THEN 'Fri'
    WHEN 7 THEN 'Sat'
  END as day_name,
  COUNT(*) as submissions,
  COUNT(DISTINCT initiated_by) as unique_users
FROM
  system.access.assistant_events
GROUP BY
  HOUR(event_time),
  DAYOFWEEK(event_date)
ORDER BY
  day_of_week,
  hour_of_day

datasets.name: user_engagement
queryLines:
WITH user_activity AS (
  SELECT
    initiated_by,
    COUNT(*) as total_submissions,
    COUNT(DISTINCT event_date) as active_days,
    DATEDIFF(MAX(event_date), MIN(event_date)) as tenure_days,
    MAX(event_date) as last_active
  FROM
    system.access.assistant_events
  GROUP BY
    initiated_by
)
SELECT
  initiated_by,
  total_submissions,
  active_days,
  tenure_days,
  last_active,
  CASE
    WHEN total_submissions >= 1000 THEN 'Power User (1000+)'
    WHEN total_submissions >= 100 THEN 'Heavy (100-999)'
    WHEN total_submissions >= 10 THEN 'Moderate (10-99)'
    ELSE 'Light (1-9)'
  END as engagement_tier,
  CASE
    WHEN last_active >= current_date - 7 THEN 'Active (7d)'
    WHEN last_active >= current_date - 30 THEN 'Active (30d)'
    WHEN last_active >= current_date - 90 THEN 'Dormant (30-90d)'
    ELSE 'Churned (90d+)'
  END as status
FROM
  user_activity

datasets.name: new_users_weekly
queryLines:
WITH first_seen AS (
  SELECT
    initiated_by,
    MIN(event_date) as first_date
  FROM
    system.access.assistant_events
  GROUP BY
    initiated_by
)
SELECT
  DATE_TRUNC('WEEK', first_date) as cohort_week,
  COUNT(*) as new_users,
  SUM(COUNT(*)) OVER (ORDER BY DATE_TRUNC('WEEK', first_date)) as cumulative_users
FROM
  first_seen
GROUP BY
  DATE_TRUNC('WEEK', first_date)
ORDER BY
  cohort_week

datasets.name: retention_monthly
queryLines:
WITH monthly_users AS (
  SELECT
    DATE_TRUNC('MONTH', event_date) as month,
    initiated_by
  FROM
    system.access.assistant_events
  GROUP BY
    DATE_TRUNC('MONTH', event_date),
    initiated_by
),
user_status AS (
  SELECT
    m.month,
    m.initiated_by,
    CASE
      WHEN prev.initiated_by IS NOT NULL THEN 'Returning'
      ELSE 'New'
    END as user_type
  FROM
    monthly_users m
      LEFT JOIN monthly_users prev
        ON m.initiated_by = prev.initiated_by
        AND m.month = ADD_MONTHS(prev.month, 1)
)
SELECT
  month,
  user_type,
  COUNT(DISTINCT initiated_by) as user_count
FROM
  user_status
GROUP BY
  month,
  user_type
ORDER BY
  month,
  user_type

datasets.name: leaderboard
queryLines:
SELECT
  initiated_by,
  COUNT(*) as total_submissions,
  COUNT(DISTINCT event_date) as active_days,
  MIN(event_date) as first_seen,
  MAX(event_date) as last_active,
  COUNT(DISTINCT workspace_id) as workspaces_used,
  ROUND(COUNT(*) * 1.0 / COUNT(DISTINCT event_date), 1) as avg_submissions_per_day
FROM
  system.access.assistant_events
GROUP BY
  initiated_by
ORDER BY
  total_submissions DESC
